title: SNEAK! and Growth
description: Sneak near crops and they will grow!
body:
#
🌱 SNEAK! and Growth Make your crops **grow faster** just by **sneaking** next to them! This lightweight plugin adds a fun and interactive way to speed up farming without breaking the vanilla feel of the game. ## 📖 Features - **🌾 Sneak to Grow** – Crouch near a crop to make it grow faster. - **⚙ Configurable** – Choose which crops are affected and set the growth speed multiplier. - **🎯 Lightweight** – Minimal performance impact. - **🛠 Compatible** – Works with Paper, Spigot, and most forks. ## 📅 Installation **1.** Download the latest version.
**2.** Drop the .jar file into your plugins folder.
**3.** Restart your server.
**4.** Edit config.yml to your liking. ## 📜 Documentation Is comming soon 😊 ## 🅱️Stats [![bStats Banner](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/SNEAKandGrowth.svg)](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/SNEAKandGrowth/26842)
